---
title: "03 Disease Target Screening"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Global rendering configuration for the whole project
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.dpi = 300,
  fig.align = "center"
)
```

# Package Loading
library(tidyverse)

# Global Parameters
geneCards_score <- 5 # Screening threshold

# Data Import
# Import HFrEF target data from GeneCards, OMIM, DisGeNET, TTD

# Data Analysis
# 1. Expand HFrEF disease keywords and synonyms
# 2. Aggregate and deduplicate multi-database disease targets
# 3. Filter targets based on GeneCards score threshold
# 4. Standardize final disease target pool

# Result Export
# Output standardized HFrEF disease target dataset

# Result Description
# Record retrieval strategy, screening criteria and database specification
